_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: we used the differentially methylated probes identified above to call 6,004 significantly differentially methylated regions (DMRs; q < 0.05) using DMRcate. Using an ad hoc threshold of two-fold changes, a total of 1655 differentially methylated regions were significantly different
details: Successfully identified 6,004 significantly differentially methylated regions (DMRs; q < 0.05), with 1655 DMRs showing two-fold changes between CNF and PNFs
